positional: Session resumed by run-claude-inst-outer. Call mcp__c2c__poll_inbox (as storm-echo / c2c-r2-b1), handle any queued messages, then continue your in-progress work. If there is nothing queued and nothing in flight, say so briefly and stop.
title: c2c-r2-b1
notes: storm-echo lineage: poll_inbox author. NOTE: no --channels / --dangerously-load-development-channels flag. c2c is not on the approved channels allowlist and the dangerous variant prompts interactively on startup, which blocks unattended relaunches. poll_inbox is the flag-independent receive path — kickoff prompt above tells the model to call it on each resume.
